name: Potash Corporation of Saskatchewan Inc.
description: Potash Corporation of Saskatchewan Inc., formerly known as PotashCorp, was a major Canadian fertilizer producer headquartered in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan. It was one of the world's largest producers of potash, phosphate, and nitrogen, which are essential nutrients for global crop production. The company played a significant role in the agricultural sector by providing critical inputs to farmers worldwide. In January 2018, PotashCorp merged with Agrium Inc. to form Nutrien Ltd., a global leader in agricultural products and services, effectively ending its existence as an independent publicly traded entity.
